briefdescription.para: To notify the call back from client library.
Variable holds the status of the OCP operation from client library and gets updated during callback.
Callback function which is registered with library to get request completion request.

parameterdescription.para: Status of the request is passed as an argument during callback.

briefdescription.para: This function sends request to ASUFW to get the DevIk X.509 certificate.

para.verbatim: The purpose of this is to illustrate how to use ASUFW client API for DevIk certificate generation.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if DevIk certificate is retrieved successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function sends request to ASUFW to get the DevAk X.509 certificate.

para.verbatim: The purpose of this is to illustrate how to use ASUFW client API for DevAk certificate generation.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if DevAk certificate is retrieved successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function sends request to ASUFW to get the DevIk CSR.

para.verbatim: The purpose of this is to illustrate how to use ASUFW client API for DevIk CSR generation.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if CSR is retrieved successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function sends attestation request to ASUFW sign the data using device attestation key.

detaileddescription.para: The purpose of this is to illustrate how to use ASU client API for data attestation.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if attestation is run successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function prints the data from given array on the console.

parameterdescription.para: Length of the data to be printed on console.

briefdescription.para: This main function to call the XAsu_AesExample function to perform AES encryption and decryption operation on given payload data.

detaileddescription.para: This main function to perform UDE private keys encryption and updates to efuses.
This main function to call the OCP example functions to perform DevAk attestation and generate the X.509 certificate for device keys.
Main function to demonstrate multi-crypto queue operations.

listitem.para: Upon successful encryption and decryption operation, it returns XASUFW_SUCCESS.
XST_SUCCESS if all operations complete successfully.
XST_SUCCESS, if example is run successfully.

inbodydescription.para: Wait for device identity and attestation key generation.
Generate X.509 DevIk CSR(Certificate Signing Request).
